sections.title: Talking to him before offering yourself as a sacrifice

lines.speaker: Zul-Gutusolly
lines.text: Have you heard? My brother has been chosen as a sacrifice to the mighty Zulrah!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do you feel about that?

lines.speaker: Zul-Gutusolly
lines.text: I'm jealous! I want to see Zulrah face-to-face too. Maybe next year they'll let me go.

lines.speaker: Zul-Gutusolly
lines.text: Also, when the sacrifice is made, our mother and I will get an extra large ration of the sacred swamp eels that Zul-Onan catches. I can't wait!

lines.speaker: Zul-Gutusolly
lines.text: My brother was chosen as a sacrifice to Zulrah, but now the priests say you're going to sacrifice yourself first. You ruined everything!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're angry that I've saved your brother's life?

lines.speaker: Zul-Gutusolly
lines.text: You don't get it, do you? He'd been looking forward to this for ages, and you ruined it. Now we won't even get the extra ration of sacred swamp eels.

lines.speaker: Zul-Gutusolly
lines.text: I hope Zulrah chews you slowly when you sacrifice yourself.

lines.speaker: Zul-Gutusolly
lines.text: I hope Zulrah chews you slowly when you sacrifice yourself.
